description: Student is overwhelmed by a laptop screen displaying a complex academic assignment. Room is cluttered, lighting is dim, reflecting stress.
visualElements: Student hunched over laptop, disheveled, stressed expression
Laptop screen with dense academic assignment brief
audioElements: Narrator V.O.: 'Feeling overwhelmed by a mountain of assignments?'
Tense, slightly dissonant background music begins
dialogue: Feeling overwhelmed by a mountain of assignments?

description: Student closes eyes in deep stress. Room blurs and subtly warps, transitioning to a warm glow.
visualElements: Student with closed eyes, deep stress
Room blurring, screen subtly warping, shifting to warm glow
audioElements: Background music softens, becomes more ambient
Narrator V.O.: 'Searching for a moment of calm, a clear path forward?'
dialogue: Searching for a moment of calm, a clear path forward?

description: Student stands relaxed on a pristine beach, sunlight on water. She breathes deeply, her expression changing to serene.
visualElements: Student (relaxed posture, simple clothes) on a pristine beach
Close-up on student's face: serene smile, clear, focused eyes
audioElements: Calming, flowing synth pad music begins, replaces tense music
Narrator V.O.: 'Imagine finding your clarity. Your peaceful place.'
dialogue: Imagine finding your clarity. Your peaceful place.

description: Student back at desk, confident. Laptop shows clean ShoreStep AI interface. She inputs assignment, AI processes, structured output displays.
visualElements: Student at desk, upright, confident posture
Laptop screen with clean, modern ShoreStep AI interface
Animation of AI processing (subtle loading/thinking visuals)
Display of structured output: PRD.md, PLAN.md, TODO.md, PROMPTS.md, git-ready folder structure
audioElements: Narrator V.O.: 'Introducing ShoreStep AI. Transform complex assignments into calm, structured action plans.'
dialogue: Introducing ShoreStep AI. Transform complex assignments into calm, structured action plans.

description: Student confidently navigates through generated markdown files on screen, highlighting key sections.
audioElements: Narrator V.O.: 'From Product Requirements to a crystal-clear TODO list. ShoreStep AI breaks it down, so you can build it up.'
dialogue: From Product Requirements to a crystal-clear TODO list. ShoreStep AI breaks it down, so you can build it up.

description: Quick alternating shots of confident student and peaceful beach. Final full-screen graphic of ShoreStep AI logo.
audioElements: Narrator V.O.: 'Find your flow. Take the first step. ShoreStep AI.'
dialogue: Find your flow. Take the first step. ShoreStep AI.
